hero.sub: Preview nested archives, extract only what you need. The macOS archive manager that should have existed all along.

formats.title: 30+ archive & disk image formats
formats.description: If you can download it, MacPacker can probably open it. Popular formats are highlighted.
formats.note: Plus other formats supported by XADMaster and 7-Zip core.

features.title: What Apple's Archive Utility won't do

peek.title: Peek inside
peek.description: Browse the full contents of any archive without extracting a single byte. Navigate folders, check sizes — all instantly.

nested.title: Nested archives
nested.description: Archives inside archives? Drill into nested compressed files seamlessly — no extracting intermediate layers first.

selective.title: Selective extraction
selective.description: Drag out exactly the files you need. No more extracting an entire 2 GB archive to grab one config file.

native.title: Native & fast
native.description: Built with Swift and SwiftUI. No Electron, no wrappers. A fast, native macOS app that feels right at home.

quicklook.title: Quick Look
quicklook.description: Hit Space to preview files right inside MacPacker. Documents, images, code — preview without extracting.

finder.title: Finder integration
finder.description: Open archives from the Finder context menu and manage files through the file provider extension.

open.title: Open
open.description: Double-click any archive or right-click in Finder. Supports 30+ formats out of the box.

browse.title: Browse
browse.description: Navigate the full folder tree. Peek inside nested archives. Preview files with Quick Look.

extract.title: Extract
extract.description: Drag out the files you need to Finder, or extract everything at once. Your choice.

openSource.title: Essential tools should be
openSource.description: MacPacker is fully open source under GPL-3.0. Inspect the code, contribute features, improve translations, or fork it. Built in the open, for everyone.

posts.title: 7-Zip core integration
posts.description: Bringing near-complete format parity with 7-Zip to macOS, along with new engines for broader archive support.

posts.title: DMG, APFS & disk images
posts.description: MacPacker now opens Apple Disk Images, APFS volumes, and virtual disk formats like VMDK, VHD, and QCOW2.

posts.title: Translating MacPacker
posts.description: Help bring MacPacker to your language. 10 translations and counting, powered by community contributors.

cta.sub: Free, open source, and built for macOS.

meta.title: MacPacker — Preview & Extract Any Archive on macOS
meta.description: Preview nested archives, extract only what you need. The macOS archive manager that should have existed all along.
